(b)        notice of the right to make representations in writing.


9.6       The documents under paragraphs 9.3 and 9.5 must be served in accordance with the relevant provisions of paragraph 8.


9.7       This paragraph applies to service of an application for variation or discharge of a DAPO without notice to P as it applies to service of an application for a DAPO without notice to P.


## 10. Service of application for a DAPO in existing proceedings


10.1     This paragraph applies where the person to be protected applies for a DAPO in existing proceedings in which both the person and P are parties.


10.2     The person to be protected must serve a copy of the DAPO application and supporting statement, if made in writing, together with notice of the hearing on—


(a)        P, personally, unless it is made without notice to P; and


(b)        any other person directed by the court,


not less than 2 days before the date on which the application will be heard.


10.3     The court may abridge the period specified in paragraph 10.2.


10.4     Where the DAPO application relates to a property and sets out details of any mortgagee or landlord of the property pursuant to paragraph 3.4(c)(ii), the person to be protected must serve on the mortgagee or landlord—


(a)        a copy of the application, if made in writing; and


(b)        notice of the right to make representations in writing.


10.5     The documents under paragraphs 10.2 and 10.4 must be served in accordance with the relevant provisions of paragraph 8.


10.6     This paragraph applies to service of an application for variation or discharge of a DAPO in existing proceedings as it applies to service of an application for a DAPO in existing proceedings.


## V — DAPO PROCEEDINGS


## 11. Hearings


11.1     Subject to paragraph 11.2, any hearing relating to proceedings under this Practice Direction will be in private unless the court directs otherwise.


11.2     Where—


(a)        the DAPO application or the application for variation or discharge of the DAPO is made in existing proceedings under paragraph 6; or


(b)        the court is considering making, varying or discharging a DAPO, in existing proceedings, under paragraph 16,
